original_snippet_context: Appointments related to the Caixa de Conversão announced by the President.
relevant_quote: Nomeando para a caixa de conversão : Vice-presidente, o Dr. Henrique de Oliveira Baltar; thesoureiro, o bacharel João Gomes Rebello Horta ; thesoureiro interino, o thesoureiro geral do Thesouro Federal Dr. Carlos Claudio da Silva
justification: This is a factual report of appointments to positions within the Caixa de Conversão, without expressing any opinion on the monetary policy itself.
